title: Wicker Shopping Basket 31cm Pink Rose Liner Oval Double Steamed Willow Carry Shopper
features: Dimensions: W30cm x H31cm x D25cm
Made Of A Strong & Secure Weave Meaning That These Are Durable & Hard Wearing Products Sure To Last A Long Time.
Perfect For A Variety Of Uses
description: A beautiful double-steamed woven willow basket with a luxurious pink garden rose lining and sturdy handle. Lightweight but strong, this oval wicker shopping basket is perfect for carrying your essentials in style. Make shopping an adventure with this fashionable carry basket shopper!
